reviews.review_description: We are having problems with getting past areas that don’t seem to work. For example, got stuck after the half way point(coffee break) and had to keep retrying to get started again. Also, can’t seem to load pipette with liquid or dispense. No ‘help’ within the trainings. Too long… the training should be several small sessions instead of strung together in a 60-90 min marathon. Not sure we can figure out how to complete. What is ‘track button’? We hit everything and cannot work pipet
